concerns.text: T036 places power/sample-size justification (FR-010) in code/analyze.py, but plan.md FR/SC Coverage Matrix explicitly assigns FR-010 to Phase 0 research.md document. Task does not match plan element location.
Plan.md Phase 1 Design output includes quickstart.md, but no task explicitly creates quickstart.md. T040 only mentions README.md documentation updates.
Plan.md Phase 1 Design output includes contracts/ directory, but T007 only mentions 'schema validation tests' without explicitly creating contracts/ directory structure.

T004 creates 'base data models' but plan.md Key Entities section specifies three entities (HumanEvalProblem, SimplifiedProblem, InferenceResult). Task description does not explicitly name these entities for traceability.
T030 implements Bonferroni correction for 'two hypotheses' but plan.md FR/SC Coverage Matrix states 'Bonferroni correction for 3 hypotheses'. Tag description mismatches plan element.
